title: Hemizygous DEL-marker IN — segregating structural-deletion calls per sample
description: JSON wrapping a long-table row list. One row per (marker_id, sample_id) pair. Genotype convention: 0/0 = no DEL allele, 0/1 = heterozygous (hemizygous) DEL, 1/1 = homozygous DEL, ./. = missing. SNPs sitting INSIDE common DEL intervals must be masked from SNP-level Mendelian checks (deletion-induced allele dropout will masquerade as homozygous SNP transmission); this contract is for the DEL markers themselves, not SNPs.
